cards.back: A brute-force algorithm that tries all possible solutions to a problem
A classic problem in combinatorial optimization where a salesman visits a set of cities and returns to the starting city in the minimum time possible
A simple and intuitive algorithm that solves a problem by trying all possible solutions
O(n!) where n is the number of items to search, making it impractical for large inputs
The best possible solution to a problem, which may not always be achievable with brute-force algorithms
